Part.Source:
HostWebServiceJaspiADM.Call(&EmpCod, &EmpWebHost, &EmpWebBaseUrl, &EmpWebPor) &Location = GetLocation('ppJASPI_SyncAll') //objeto externo onde foi importado o WSDL no GX XEV1 &Location.Host = &EmpWebHost //servidor &Location.Port = &EmpWebPor //porta &Location.BaseUrl = &EmpWebBaseUrl //diretório virtual do serviço &Location.Secure = false //false &Location.CancelOnError = 2 //tratar exceção do WS
Do CAse CAse &OqueSyncronizar = 'GRAVARINF_CLIENTE' For Each Order EmpCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll.SyncKey = EmpCodSec.Trim() &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll.SyncOque = 'GRAVARINF_CLIENTE'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilVctCer Where not FilVctCer.IsEmpty() and not FilVctCer.IsNull() &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem = new() &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SyncCod = 'CliVctCer' &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SynValue = FilVctCer.ToFormattedString() &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll.Sync.SyncItems.Add(&ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem) Exit EndFor
&ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem = new() &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SyncCod = 'CliVer' &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SynValue = EmpVer.ToFormattedString() &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll.Sync.SyncItems.Add(&ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem)
&ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem = new() &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SyncCod = 'CliCmp' &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SynValue = EmpCmp.ToFormattedString() &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll.Sync.SyncItems.Add(&ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem)
&ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem = new() &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SyncCod = 'AppSubCod' &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SynValue = 'ERP_JASPI' &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll.Sync.SyncItems.Add(&ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem)
// &Count = 0 // For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod // Where EmpCod = &EmpCod // Where NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA // Where NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada // &Count += 1 // EndFor
// &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem = new() // &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SyncCod = 'NfeQtdPen' // &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SynValue = &Count.ToFormattedString() // &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll.Sync.SyncItems.Add(&ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem)
// &Count = 0 // For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod // Where EmpCod = &EmpCod // //Where NfeProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA // Where CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada // &Count += 1 // EndFor
// &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem = new() // &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SyncCod = 'CteQtdPen' // &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem.SynValue = &Count.ToFormattedString() // &ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll.Sync.SyncItems.Add(&ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll_SyncItem)
Exit EndFor
&outPpJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll = &ppJASPI_SyncAll.Execute(&ppJASPI_SyncAllsdtSyncAll)
&ProgressID = trim(Str(&EmpCod)) + &OqueSyncronizar.trim()
If GetSOAPErr()= 0 For Each Order ProgressId Where ProgressId = &ProgressID ProgressIni = serverdate() ProgressFin = serverdate() ProgressLogXml = '100' When None New ProgressId = &ProgressID ProgressIni = serverdate() ProgressFin = serverdate() ProgressLogXml = '100' EndNEw EndFor
Commit EndIf EndCAse
